x-enumeration-literals.name: ReadAccountsDetail
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ability to read account identification details

x-enumeration-literals.name: ReadBalances
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ability to read all balance information

x-enumeration-literals.description: Ability to read basic beneficiary details

x-enumeration-literals.name: ReadBeneficiariesDetail
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ability to read account identification details for the beneficiary

x-enumeration-literals.name: ReadDirectDebits
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ability to read all direct debit information

x-enumeration-literals.name: ReadOffers
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ability to read all offer information

x-enumeration-literals.name: ReadPAN
x-enumeration-literals.description: Request to access PAN in the clear across the available endpoints.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ReadParty
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ability to read party information on the account owner.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ReadPartyPSU
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ability to read party information on the PSU logged in.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ReadProducts
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ability to read all product information relating to the account

x-enumeration-literals.description: Ability to read basic statement details

x-enumeration-literals.description: Ability to read basic statement details

x-enumeration-literals.name: ReadStatementsDetail
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ability to read statement data elements which may leak other information about the account

x-enumeration-literals.description: Ability to read basic transaction information

x-enumeration-literals.name: ReadTransactionsDebits
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ability to read only debit transactions

x-enumeration-literals.name: ReadTransactionsDetail
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ability to read transaction data elements which may hold silent party details
